_comment: Copy this to smartmon.json and fill in your own devices — or just add them from the dashboard (Add device / Scan network). smartmon.json is git-ignored because it holds Tuya local keys, and it is deliberately NOT named devices.json so tinytuya's wizard/scan can't read or overwrite it. Extract each device's local key once with `tinytuya wizard` (see the README). Only 'ip', 'device_id', and 'local_key' are required per Tuya device; 'dps' and 'options' override the type defaults only when a device deviates from them.

devices.name: Living Room Climate
devices._note: mode_map matches the EG4/Deye mini-split SolarPi already reads (cold/hot/wet). This is the same unit — SolarPi reads it read-only; SmartMonitor can also control it.

devices.name: Older Dimmable Lamp
devices._note: Example of a first-gen Tuya light: switch on DP 1, brightness on DP 2 with a 25..255 scale.
